---
title: "My First Revealjs Presentation Slide"
subtitle: "Sample for portfolio website project required to be completed"
author: "Angelina Jao"
institute: "IBM 3202, Cal Poly Pomona"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: "My Portfolio Website Proposal"
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: false
    number-depth: 5
    embed-resources: true
    css: styles.css
editor: visual
execute:
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

# Introduction {background-color="#2c3e50"}

## Who I Am

::::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
-   **Name:** Angelina Jao
-   **Major:** Business Administration - Marketing Management
-   **Goal:** To build a professional portfolio website using R, Quarto & GitHub Pages

> "Choose to be optimistic, it feels better" - Dali Lama
:::

::: {.column width="40%"}
![](images/img%2022.png)
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## My Website Plan

::: incremental
-   **Home Page** — Introduction and personal statement
-   **Marketing Projects** — Data-driven case studies & visualizations
-   **Dashboard** — Interactive data dashboard
-   **RevealJS Presentation** — This slide deck, embedded!
-   **Google Analytics** — Live traffic tracking
:::

# Home Page {background-color="#1a1a2e"}

## Introduction of myself

::: {.fragment .fade-in}
### Personal Statement

My name is Angelina Jao and I am currently a third year student at Cal Poly Pomona studying in Marketing Management. I am also a shift lead at Chick-Fil-A and my hobbies are listening to music, playing video games, and hanging out with my friends. I hope that the things that I am learning in this class, I can use this for my future jobs.
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-up}
### Featured Work

**Course:** MHR 3010

A competitive and strategic analysis of JPMorgan Chase including SWOT, financial performance (2020–2024), and recommendations.

[View Presentation](MHR%20-%20Team%20Report%20Presentation.pdf)
:::

::: {.fragment .fade-left}
### Contact / Social Links

<https://www.linkedin.com/in/angelina-g-jao/>

<https://github.com/angelinagjao>
:::

# Marketing Projects {background-color="#16213e"}

## Case Study Preview

::: panel-tabset
### Overview

This visualization uses the built-in R `economics` dataset to explore
U.S. consumer saving behavior over time, including:

- Personal savings rate trends
- Long-term consumer spending patterns
- Economic shifts across major historical events

### Sample Visualization

```{r}
#| label: fig-spending
#| fig-cap: "U.S. Personal Savings Rate Over Time"
#| fig-width: 8
#| fig-height: 4
#| echo: true

library(ggplot2)

ggplot(economics, aes(x = date, y = psavert)) +
  geom_line(color = "#e94560", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_smooth(color = "white", se = FALSE, linewidth = 0.5) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  labs(
    x = "Year",
    y = "Personal Savings Rate (%)",
    title = "U.S. Personal Savings Rate (1967-2015)",
    subtitle = "Source: ggplot2 economics dataset"
  )
```

### Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Time Period | 1967 - 2015 |
| Peak Savings Rate | ~17% (early 1970s) |
| Lowest Savings Rate | ~2% (mid 2000s) |
| Dataset | Built-in R `economics` |
:::

# Dashboard {background-color="#0f3460"}

## Dashboard Plan

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Tools I'll use:**

-   `flexdashboard` or `Quarto dashboard`
-   `plotly` for interactive charts
-   `DT` for searchable data tables
-   Embedded in website as its own page
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**What it will show:**

-   Real-time or simulated KPIs
-   Filterable marketing data
-   Geographic visualizations
:::
:::::

# RevealJS Presentation {background-color="#533483"}

## What Makes RevealJS Powerful

::: incremental
-   Renders from plain text (`.qmd`) → no PowerPoint needed
-   Can be published to GitHub Pages or Quarto Pub
-   Speaker mode (`S` key) shows notes + timer
:::

# Google Analytics {background-color="#1b4332"}

## Tracking My Portfolio

::::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Learning with Google Demo Account**

1.  I use the free GA4 Demo Account at [analytics.google.com](https://analytics.google.com)
2.  I explored real traffic data from the **Google Merchandise Store**
3.  Practiced reading key reports:
    -   Acquisition (where visitors come from)
    -   Engagement (what they do on site)
    -   Retention (do they come back?)
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
**Steps to take when I launch my portfolio site:**

1.  Create my own GA4 property
2.  Get my **Measurement ID**
3.  Add to `_quarto.yml`:

``` yaml
website:
  google-analytics: "G-XXXXXXXXXX"
```
:::
:::::

# Publishing Plan {background-color="#2d6a4f"}

## How I'll Publish

::: incremental
-   GitHub Pages
-   Quarto Pub
:::

https://rpubs.com/agjao/1410504

# Thank You {background-color="#2c3e50"}

## Questions?

::::: columns
::: {.column width="60%"}
**Angelina Jao**

Business Administration - Marketing Management

Cal Poly Pomona

agjao\@cpp.edu\
<https://www.linkedin.com/in/angelina-g-jao/> <https://github.com/angelinagjao>
:::

## References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::
:::::
